About me

Marketing at the intersection of
data & creativity

Originally from Naples, now based in Helsinki — I've built a career that bridges two worlds: the analytical rigour of performance marketing and the storytelling instinct of a creative. My background in drama and arts taught me how to communicate. My business education taught me how to measure it.

I thrive in complex B2B environments where marketing has to earn its seat at the revenue table. Whether I'm architecting a HubSpot CRM from scratch, running ABM programmes for strategic accounts, or project-managing a major European trade show — I bring the same combination of strategic thinking, hands-on execution, and obsessive attention to outcomes.

I believe in Amor Fati — embracing the path fully. Right now, that means channelling five years of hard-won B2B experience into the next challenge, where I can build systems that genuinely move revenue.

Case Studies

Real campaigns.
Real systems. Real results.

Click any case study to read the full story — strategy, execution, and outcome.

01Demand Generation
Multi-Market Demand Generation — Metso Europe
Built and executed a regional B2B digital marketing strategy across 7+ European countries, managing 5–8 concurrent campaigns with a focus on qualified pipeline growth.
+22% YoY Leads+18% CTR−12% CPC7+ Markets
Read full case study
02CRM & BD Process
HubSpot CRM Architecture & Commercial Pipeline — Kuva Space
Built a full HubSpot CRM from broken foundations — fixing data integrity across 1,038 contacts, designing a 6-stage commercial pipeline, creating three automation flows, and producing the company-wide BD process guide.
1,038 Contacts Cleaned+20% MQL→SQL7 hrs/week saved
Read full case study
03ABM Strategy & Reporting
Account-Based Marketing — Metso EU Programme & Kuva Space LinkedIn Launch
Designed and ran 20 LinkedIn ABM campaigns for Metso across 5 product lines and 4+ EU markets (Oct 2023–Aug 2025) — €4,735 spend, 493K impressions, 1,615 clicks — with a documented 4-step Sales→Marketing coordination process and multi-dimensional reporting back to Regional Sales Managers. In parallel, launched Kuva Space's first-ever LinkedIn advertising programme with a custom 15,000-member NATO/ESA defence audience built from zero.
20 ABM Campaigns493K+ ImpressionsSales→Marketing Process
Read full case study
04Event Marketing
Trade Show & Event Marketing — 6 Major European Industry Events (2022–2024)
Six major European industry trade shows led end-to-end across 2022–2024 in CEEE and Nordic markets: Steinexpo 2023 (Germany, 61,530 visitors, 26M+ social impressions, €27.7M pipeline influenced), SIM 22-24 (France), MMH 24 (Seville, Iberian Peninsula), FINNmateria 23-24 (Finland), Euro Mine Expo 24 (Sweden), and Vei og Anlegg 24 (Norway). Pre-event Pardot programmes, on-site content production, customer hospitality, and post-event nurture conversion. Also contributed to Lokolaunch 2024 in a content-support role.
6 Trade Shows Led€27.7M Pipeline26M+ Impressions
Read full case study
05Marketing Automation
Email Automation & Multi-Language Nurture — Metso Pardot
Built scalable automated email workflows in Pardot and Marketing Cloud with multi-language variants, integrated with Salesforce — transforming lead engagement across all European markets.
+30% Lead Engagement7 MarketsSalesforce Integration
Read full case study
06SEO & Content
Local-Market Web Publishing & SEO — Metso (Episerver/Optimizely) & Kuva Space (Sanity.io)
Multi-market web publishing across two clients. At Metso (2022–2025): maintained 4 EU country domains (.fi, .se, .fr, .de) on Episerver/Optimizely — annual SEO keyword audits for strategic aggregates products (e.g. Contender™ Series) feeding both on-domain copy updates and quarterly Display Ad campaigns; 11 event landing pages across 9 trade shows; localised case studies co-produced with product managers; Piwik Pro analytics function 2024–2025. At Kuva Space (2025–2026): owned new Sanity.io webpage creation for major press releases (Hyperfield-1B, Dark Vessels, WWF-Indonesia and others).
4 Metso EU Domains11 Event PagesSanity.io Pages H2 2025
Read full case study
